name: Eagers Automotive Limited
analysis: APE has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 36% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$22.4400, stop A$19.5327, target A$24.8000 (0.81:1) — then trail it.
